title: 📰 HSBC Completes Tokenized Deposit Pilot on Canton Network
message: HSBC successfully ran its first public-blockchain tokenized deposit pilot on Canton, simulating atomic settlement against other digital assets in USD, GBP, EUR, HKD and SGD.

title: 📰 White House Says CLARITY Act Deal Is 'Very Close'
message: Top Trump crypto adviser Patrick Witt said outstanding hurdles on the CLARITY Act are clearing, signaling Senate passage could come within weeks.

title: 📰 Ether Outpaces Bitcoin as ETF Flows Split
message: ETH jumped 8% in 24 hours while spot bitcoin ETFs bled $325M on April 13, the clearest sign yet of capital rotation into Ethereum.

title: 📰 Bitcoin Anchors Near $70K as Hormuz Blockade Keeps Crypto on Edge
message: BTC is hovering near $70,000 and ether is down 4% after U.S.-Iran peace talks collapsed and Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 📰 Ether Outpaces Bitcoin as ETF Flows Split
message: Spot BTC ETFs bled $326M on April 13 while ether funds added $7.7M, as on-chain Ethereum activity jumped 41% week-over-week.

title: 📰 Ether Outpaces Bitcoin as ETF Flows Split, On-Chain Activity Jumps 41%
message: Capital is rotating from spot BTC ETFs into ether funds as Ethereum's daily transactions surge 41% week-over-week to 3.6 million.

title: 📰 Bitcoin Reclaims $73,400 as Oil Retreats Below $100
message: Bitcoin erased the weekend's Hormuz-blockade selloff and pushed back above $73,000 as crude oil slipped under $100 and U.S. stocks advanced.

title: 📰 Kraken Refuses Extortion Demand Over Insider Data Leak
message: Kraken confirmed an extortion attempt tied to two insider-access incidents affecting about 2,000 accounts, but says no systems were breached and no client funds are at risk.

title: 📰 Hyperbridge Hacker Mints 1B Fake DOT, Walks With $237K
message: An attacker forged a cross-chain message on Hyperbridge's Ethereum gateway, minted 1 billion bridged DOT, and dumped them for just $237K in ETH.

title: 📰 CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Banking Markup This Week
message: The Digital Asset Market CLARITY Act returns to the Senate this week, with Banking Committee markup expected before month-end or crypto legislation slips past the midterms.

title: 📰 Hyperbridge Exploit Mints 1B Fake DOT, Nets Hacker Just $237K
message: An attacker forged a cross-chain message to seize admin control of Hyperbridge's Ethereum DOT contract and dumped 1 billion minted tokens for $237,000 in ETH.

title: 📰 BlackRock Q1 Earnings Land Today With IBIT Flows in Focus
message: BlackRock reports Q1 earnings Tuesday morning, and its IBIT Bitcoin ETF disclosures are the most-watched institutional crypto signal of the week.

title: 📰 Anthropic's Mythos AI Exposes Critical DeFi Security Flaws
message: Anthropic's unreleased Mythos AI model discovered thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities in critical crypto infrastructure, prompting an emergency meeting between Treasury Secretary Bessent and bank CEOs.
